home.description:
High school student based in Germany exploring finance, economics, and capital markets. I focus on analyzing companies through financial statements, valuation fundamentals, and market dynamics.

I am developing a structured, analytical approach to interpreting data, identifying key value drivers, and forming investment perspectives, with a strong emphasis on continuous learning.

skills.financial-statements: Basic understanding of financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)
skills.kpi-interpretation: Initial experience with interpreting simple KPIs (e.g. growth, margins)
skills.peer-comparison: General awareness of peer comparison concepts
skills.sector-differences: Introductory insights into differences across sectors
skills.valuation-basics: Foundational understanding of valuation approaches (e.g. multiples, on a conceptual level)
skills.value-drivers: Awareness of factors that can influence company value
skills.dcf-logic: Initial exposure to the logic behind DCF valuation
skills.upside-downside-scenarios: Early-stage thinking in terms of upside and downside scenarios
skills.market-trends-news-impact: General interest in market trends and their impact on companies
skills.price-fundamentals-relationship: Basic understanding of the relationship between price and fundamentals
skills.pattern-observation: Initial attempts to identify patterns in financial data
skills.data-interpretation-insights: Interest in translating data into meaningful insights

nyif.degree: Certificate for Essential Career Skills for Investment Banking and Finance

bmw.shortDescription: Equity research on BMW AG covering financials, valuation, and peer comparison.

allianz.shortDescription: Equity research on Allianz SE covering financials, valuation, and peer comparison.
